query:
SELECT
                    COALESCE(device_type, 'unknown') as "device",
                    COALESCE(browser, 'unknown') as "browser",
                    COUNT(*)::bigint as "count!"
                FROM v_clean_traffic
                WHERE started_at >= $1 AND started_at < $2
                GROUP BY device_type, browser
                ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
                LIMIT $3
